overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a first-person perspective walking through a street protest in Night City at dusk, passing through an NCPD security checkpoint, then transitioning to driving through neon-lit downtown streets and into a back alley. The scene features cyberpunk architecture with holographic billboards, wet reflective streets, and dense urban atmosphere.

events.description: entering area with protesters holding signs and placards
weaving through dense crowd of protesters

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a crowd of protesters holding signs including 'THE END IS NEAR'

notable_agents.action: protester holding large sign above head, wearing plaid shirt and beanie

entered.detail: massive concrete highway structure spanning overhead with support columns
large pink holographic advertisement floating above the street
small vendor stall with glowing lights and signage
yellow and black striped road barriers lining the walkway

segments.scene_description: The scene opens under a massive elevated highway overpass in a cyberpunk city at dusk. The camera moves through a moderate crowd of protesters holding signs, with neon holograms and food stalls visible. The wet asphalt reflects the mixed lighting from sunset and artificial sources.

events.description: exiting protest crowd into empty checkpoint zone with barricades

agents.ego_description: walking through cleared area toward security checkpoint with NCPD barricades ahead

entered.detail: police barricades with flashing red lights blocking the road ahead
red neon sign reading 'NO ENTRY' above checkpoint gate
metal security gate with fencing and concrete barriers

segments.scene_description: Leaving the crowd behind, the camera enters a sparse checkpoint area under the overpass. NCPD barricades with red warning lights block the path ahead, and a 'NO ENTRY' sign glows neon red. The area is nearly empty except for a parked van and security infrastructure.

scene_state.functional_zone: security checkpoint with road closed barriers

events.description: approaching NCPD officer standing guard at checkpoint barrier
passing through checkpoint gate onto open city street with visible sky

agents.ego_description: walking past NCPD officer and through checkpoint barriers onto the main street

notable_agents.action: NCPD officer in blue uniform standing guard at the security gate

entered.detail: red and white striped barriers with 'ROAD CLOSED' text blocking the lane
open intersection with multi-lane road and palm trees visible beyond the gate

segments.scene_description: The camera passes through a narrow security checkpoint with red-lit barriers and an NCPD officer standing guard. Emerging from under the overpass, the scene opens onto a city street intersection at dusk, with palm trees and neon billboards visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: city sidewalk alongside multi-lane road with neon billboards

events.description: police cruiser with flashing lights passes by on the street
transitioning from walking to driving as camera enters vehicle

agents.ego_description: walking along sidewalk observing traffic and cityscape before entering a vehicle

notable_agents.action: person in yellow raincoat standing on sidewalk corner

entered.detail: wide asphalt road with multiple lanes and crosswalk markings
large illuminated advertisements on building facades including 'HOLT' campaign poster
curved highway overpass structure with support columns

segments.scene_description: Now on an open city street at dusk, the camera walks along the sidewalk past a person in a yellow raincoat. A police cruiser drives past on the multi-lane road, and neon billboards illuminate the buildings. The segment ends as the perspective shifts to driving.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy downtown city street with traffic and neon signage

events.description: accelerating to follow police cruiser down the street
navigating through intersection with other vehicles and pedestrians

agents.ego_description: driving through downtown streets following a police cruiser with blue neon underglow

notable_agents.action: police cruiser with 'POLICE' markings and blue neon lights driving ahead

entered.detail: tall urban structures with glass facades and illuminated signage
downtown road with traffic lights and crosswalks

segments.scene_description: Driving through the neon-lit downtown, the camera follows a police cruiser with glowing blue underlights. The street is lined with commercial buildings and palm trees, with moderate traffic and pedestrians visible on sidewalks. The warm dusk sky contrasts with the artificial neon illumination.

scene_state.functional_zone: back alley with parked vehicles and graffiti

events.description: turning from main road into narrow back alley with industrial elements
stopping vehicle next to parked sports car with NPCs nearby

agents.ego_description: driving into a narrow alley and stopping beside a parked sports car where NPCs are interacting

notable_agents.action: black sports car parked in alley with door open
woman in purple boots leaning into car window talking to driver

entered.detail: confined back street with walls on both sides and overhead structures
large green and red waste containers against the wall
white painted symbols and markings on the asphalt surface

segments.scene_description: The vehicle turns off the main street into a narrow back alley with graffiti on the ground and industrial dumpsters. The camera stops beside a parked black sports car where two women are standing, one leaning into the driver's window. The alley is dimly lit with neon signs visible in the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a crowded urban protest under a massive overpass into a sterile security zone and finally out toward an open city intersection. It begins by weaving through a moderate crowd of protesters and food stalls, where wet asphalt reflects the clash of sunset and neon holograms. As the camera leaves the crowd behind, the environment shifts into a sparse checkpoint area characterized by red warning lights, NCPD barricades, and a glowing neon no-entry sign. The scene then narrows as the camera passes a guarding officer and red-lit barriers before emerging from the shadow of the overpass. Finally, the view expands onto a wide city street at dusk, revealing distant palm trees and towering neon billboards.

The shot follows a continuous perspective that transitions from a pedestrian walk through a bustling city street into a vehicle journey ending in a secluded urban alley. It begins on a sidewalk at dusk, passing a person in a yellow raincoat as a police cruiser glides past under the glow of towering neon billboards. As the perspective shifts to driving, the camera follows a police cruiser with glowing blue underlights through a downtown corridor lined with palm trees and commercial buildings beneath a warm evening sky. The scene then turns away from the main road, diving into a narrow, dimly lit back alley characterized by ground graffiti and industrial dumpsters. Finally, the movement comes to a halt beside a parked black sports car where two women are conversing, with the distant neon signs of the city providing a faint backdrop.
